milestone: Deep integration wiring complete - Self-evolution loop now functional end-to-end
key_deliverables: ExperienceMemory now provides get_experiences_for_retraining() and compute_pattern_timing_stats() with surprise/trend analytics
FastBacktester extended with policy_checkpoint + ppo_model loading + SB3 PPO adapter + decode_action path
RetrainingOrchestrator cleaned and completed: real async training launches, job polling, memory-driven triggers, checkpoint passing to backtester, full cycle working
Verified closed loop: memory high-value/surprise signals → retrain decision → fast backtest validation (with real checkpoint) → promotion path
impact: The core self-improvement engine is now wired. The system can use past pattern+timing experiences to decide when and what to retrain, validate candidates rapidly with the rich Decision PPO engine, and promote better models autonomously.
next: Meta-Optimizer full implementation + first real multi-week validation campaign using the harness + full supervisor loop demo
